description: Real-component visual decisions for Vite + React projects: renders 2-3 candidate variants with the project's OWN components on its own dev server via a scratch HTML entry (zero edits to existing files), behind a strict consent gate with guaranteed cleanup. Escalation tier above static shell mockups — falls back to them when Vite is absent. Includes /design-preview:preview.

interface.longDescription:
Real-component visual decisions for Vite + React projects: renders 2-3 candidate variants with the project's OWN components on its own dev server via a scratch HTML entry (zero edits to existing files), behind a strict consent gate with guaranteed cleanup. Escalation tier above static shell mockups — falls back to them when Vite is absent. Includes /design-preview:preview.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
